lesson_content_chk.name: lesson_content_chk
lesson_content_chk.value: "lesson"."body_md" IS NOT NULL OR "lesson"."video_media_id" IS NOT NULL

enroll_source_id_chk.name: enroll_source_id_chk
enroll_source_id_chk.value:
("enrollment"."source" = 'paid' AND "enrollment"."source_pending_id" IS NOT NULL AND "enrollment"."source_grant_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("enrollment"."source" = 'admin_grant' AND "enrollment"."source_grant_id" IS NOT NULL AND "enrollment"."source_pending_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("enrollment"."source" = 'free_course' AND "enrollment"."source_pending_id" IS NULL AND "enrollment"."source_grant_id" IS NULL)
